palette_hint: warm off-white background (#faf7f2), dark charcoal text (#2c2c2c), deep forest green primary (#2d6a4f), and terracotta accent (#c1440e)
type_style: Georgia serif for headings (bold, warm feel), system sans-serif (Arial/Helvetica) for body text at regular weight
description: A community literacy nonprofit called the Ironwood Literacy Project that provides adult reading programs across rural Appalachia.
constraints: fixed-width centered container of 1080px with 24px side padding
top nav: logo text on left in forest green, page links in a flex row on right in charcoal, terracotta underline on active link
every page shares a 3-column footer: About blurb | Quick Links | Contact details, with a thin green top border
section headings use Georgia bold at 28-32px; body text 16px line-height 1.7
CTA buttons are rounded (6px radius), forest green background, white text, no hover effects

page_specs.mission: Full-width banner with the org name, tagline 'Reading changes everything — one adult at a time', and a short founding story paragraph. Below that, a two-column layout: left column lists three core values as titled paragraphs, right column shows a bordered pull-quote from a program graduate.
page_specs.programs: Intro paragraph explaining the three active programs, followed by a CSS grid of three program cards (each with a terracotta top border, program name, location served, schedule, and a short description). Below the cards, a small callout box in light green noting eligibility requirements.
page_specs.impact: A stats row of four key numbers (e.g., '1,240 adults served', '14 counties reached', '92% completion rate', '6 years running') laid out in flexbox with each stat centered in its cell. Below, a 2x2 grid of short success story excerpts with a name and county attribution under each.
page_specs.volunteer: Two-column layout: left side has a numbered list of volunteer roles with one-sentence descriptions each; right side has a simple signup form (name, email, county, preferred role as a select, and submit button). Above both columns, an intro paragraph explaining time commitment and training.
page_specs.donate: Centered heading and two-paragraph explanation of how donations are used. Below, three giving-level boxes in a flex row (Friend $25, Sustainer $75, Champion $150) each showing the amount, a label, and two bullet points on impact. A standalone donation CTA button beneath the boxes links to a placeholder. Footer note about 501(c)(3) tax-exempt status.
